info.name: Microsoft Azure MonitorManagementClient
info.description: Azure Monitor API reference for Private Links Scopes management.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Providers Microsoft Insights Privatelinkscopes

request.description: Gets a list of all Azure Monitor PrivateLinkScopes within a subscription.

response.name: A list containing 0 or more Azure Monitor PrivateLinkScope definitions.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.body: null

response.name: An error occurred.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Put Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Insights Privatelinkscopes Scopename

variable.description: (Required) The name of the Azure Monitor PrivateLinkScope resource.

request.description: Creates (or updates) a Azure Monitor PrivateLinkScope. Note: You cannot specify a different value for InstrumentationKey nor AppId in the Put operation.

response.name: Successful request when creating or updating a Azure Monitor PrivateLinkScope. The updated PrivateLinkScope is returned.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.body: null

response.name: Successful request when creating or updating a Azure Monitor PrivateLinkScope. The updated PrivateLinkScope was created and is returned.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.body: null

response.name: An error occurred.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Patch Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Insights Privatelinkscopes Scopename

variable.description: (Required) The name of the Azure Monitor PrivateLinkScope resource.

request.description: Updates an existing PrivateLinkScope's tags. To update other fields use the CreateOrUpdate method.

response.name: Updating the Azure Monitor PrivateLinkScope's tags was successful. PrivateLinkScope tags are updated and returned with the rest of the PrivateLinkScope's object properties.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.body: null

response.name: An error occurred.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
